login.help_lead: Mukufuna thandizo? Tili pano nthawi zonse —
login.err_google: Kulowa ndi Google kwalephera. Onani Firebase.

admin_contact.title: Manambala ndi njira zolumikizira
admin_contact.lede: Zikuwonetsedwa pa tsamba la «Lumikizanani nafe» ndi kulowa.
admin_contact.required: Dzina lomwe limawoneka ndi mtengo zofunika.
admin_contact.err_firestore_permission: Firestore sinakulole kuwona. Tsatirani malamulo (firebase deploy --only firestore:rules) ndikutsimikiza admin: users/{uid} ali ndi role admin kapena isAdmin, kapena admins/{uid}.
admin_contact.err_firestore_index: Kufunika index ya Firestore. Tsegulani link mu console.

admin_enrollment_requests.title: Zopempha kulowa
admin_enrollment_requests.lede: Onani zopempha za ophunzira kulowa m'maphunziro ndi mafolda — monga app.
admin_enrollment_requests.folder_accepted: Pempho la folda lavomeredwa ndipo wophunzira wavalembedwa.
admin_enrollment_requests.course_reactivate: Pempho lavomeredwa ndipo zoyambitsira zasinthidwa. Wophunzira anali kale.
admin_enrollment_requests.course_accepted: Pempho lavomeredwa ndipo wophunzira wavalembedwa mu kalasi.

quiz_video.no_embed_hint: Sitingathe kuyika pano — tsegulani mu browser.

admin_lesson_quizzes.lede: Pangani ndi sinthani quiz za phunziro (quiz_files monga app).
admin_lesson_quizzes.sched_need_dates: Ikukonda nthawi: ikani tsiku loyambira ndi lomaliza.

admin_student_view.title: Zambiri za wophunzira
admin_student_view.lede: Sinthani deta ndi zolumikizira (maphunziro, mafolda, zopempha).

home.title: Kunyumba
home.subtitle_short: Kuwona msanga za zochitika ndi manambala.
home.load_partial: Nambazo zina zinalodzedwa pang'ono. Onani zilolezo.
home.load_failed: Sitingathe kulodza zina za dashboard. Yesaninso pambuyo.
home.lede_admin: Dashboard ya admin: maphunziro, zopempha, ndi zolemba.
home.lede_student: Dashboard ya wophunzira: maphunziro anga, zopempha, kalalogu, ndi zidziwitso — monga app.
home.process_from_courses: Yendetsani kuchokera ku tsamba la maphunziro

posts.lede_admin: Lembani ndi kutulutsa zolemba kwa ophunzira. Ophunzira amaona zolemba zotulutsidwa zokha (monga app).
posts.lede_student: Zidziwitso ndi zolemba zotulutsidwa ndi admin kwa ophunzira.
posts.load_failed: Sitingathe kulodza zolemba. Onani malamulo ndi zoyambira za Firestore.
posts.publish_for_students: Tulutsani kwa ophunzira (kuwoneka mu app ndi web)

settings.lede: Mayendeso ya akaunti ndi mndandanda — mbiri ndi kutuluka komanso kuli pamwamba.
settings.load_code_failed: Sitingathe kulodza khodi ya admin yapano; yoyambirira idzagwiritsidwa ntchito.
settings.code_save_failed: Sitingathe kusunga khodi ya admin tsopano.
settings.admin_security_lede: Khodi yolowera ya admin iyenera polowa ngati admin. Khodi yoyambirira:
settings.toggle_code_aria: Onetsani kapena kubisa khodi ya admin
settings.link_contact_public: Lumikizanani nafe — manambala ndi njira zothandizira

notifications.lede: Zidziwitso zomwe zimatanthauza ndi app. Chiwerengero pamwamba chimasintha mukamawerenga.
notifications.send_failed: Sitingathe kutumiza. Onani ID ya wosuta ndi zilolezo.
notifications.recipient_search_ph: Fufuzani ndi dzina, imelo, kapena ID
notifications.hint_all: Zitumizidwa kwa ogwiritsa ntchito onse ogwira.

profile.title: Mbiri
profile.lede: Sinthani dzina, foni, ndi chithunzi — zimatanthauza ndi Firestore ndi app.
profile.err_image_type: Sankhani fayilo ya chithunzi (PNG kapena JPEG).
profile.password_ok: Chinsinsi cha kulowa ndi foni chakhazikitsidwa.
profile.password_failed: Sitingathe kukhazikitsa chinsinsi. Lowani kaye ndi yesaninso.
profile.password_hint: Pambuyo pa Google, mungathe kukhazikitsa chinsinsi kulowa ndi foni.

student_mycourses.lede_short: Maphunziro anu pambuyo pempho lanu lovomerezedwa.
student_mycourses.lede: Maphunziro omwe admin wavomereza — monga tab ya «Maphunziro anga» mu app.
student_mycourses.load_failed: Sitingathe kulodza maphunziro anu. Onani malamulo a Firestore.
student_mycourses.empty_cta: Pitani ku maphunziro ndi kufunsira kulowa

student_myfiles.lede_loading: Mafoda ndi mafayilo — web monga app.
student_myfiles.lede: Monga tab «Mafayilo» mu app: mafoda anga ndi kuwona mafoda omwe alipo.
student_myfiles.empty_search: Palibe zofanana ndi fufuzo mu mafoda anu.
student_myfiles.empty_none: Palibe mafoda mu «Mafoda anga». Admin akakuyikani mu folda, idzawoneka apa.

admin_folders.lede: Sinthani mafoda — monga tab «Mafoda» mu app.

student_explore.lede: Maphunziro ndi mafayilo pamodzi monga app, koma ndi web.
student_explore.courses_hint: Maphunziro a public: lembetsani. Zachinsinsi: pemphani.
student_explore.files_hint: Mafolda a public: lembetsani. Zachinsinsi: pemphani.

courses.lede_admin: Pangani ndi kusintha maphunziro, sinthani zopempha, lumikizani maphunziro.
courses.lede_student: Yendani maphunziro, pemphani, kapena pitani ku maphunziro anga.

student_requests.lede_short: Tsatirani zopempha — monga «Zopempha zanga» mu app.
student_requests.lede: Tsatirani zopempha za maphunziro ndi mafoda — monga mu app.

student_course_view.lede_preview: Onani monga wophunzira: maphunziro popanda malire (admin yokha).
student_course_view.lede_student: Zambiri za kalasi ndi maphunziro — monga app.

student_lesson.not_enrolled: Simuli ndi chilolezo cha maphunziro a kalasi.
student_lesson.mandatory_quiz_note: Mungafune kupambana quiz monga zokonda za kalasi.

student_quiz.intro_tabs_hint: Gwiritsani tab ya Mafunso kuyankha, ndi zotsatira pambuyo.
student_quiz.finalized_questions_hint: Kutumiza kwatsekedwa. Onani tab ya zotsatira.

student_folder.zip_failed: Sitingathe kutsitsa ZIP. Yesani fayilo limodzi.

lesson_content.pdf_hint: Ngati palibe kuwona, tsegulani tab yatsopano.
